data.name: Tamas Awakening
data.detailed_description:
About This Game

Tamas Awakening is a 2D hand-drawn visual novel with stunning artwork, where you play as a young psychologist who uncovers a mysterious ancient power after an encounter with a mystical entity. With this newfound gift, your confidence and desires awaken — and so do the passions of those around you.

Indulge in fiery encounters with the women closest to you — and others — as you explore your deepest fantasies together. This game is packed with intense impregnation scenes, plenty of breeding-focused dialogue, and unapologetic eroticism.

This is a linear nukige game, with no choices and no alternative endings. Sex comes first, story comes second — exactly how you like it.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 and Above

  • 顯示卡: Integrated or better
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
